subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath aided thee to turn towards Him in these days wherein the servants have turned away from the horizon of Manifestation, save them whom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ایدک علی الاقبال فی ایام فیها اعرض العباد عن افق الظهور الا من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for prosperity, @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
